title: Images and Multimedia Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential tags for embedding rich media in HTML.

questions.question: Which of these is the correct tag for embedding an image?
What is the purpose of the 'alt' attribute in the <img> tag?
options: It provides alternative colors for the image.
It provides a description for screen readers (accessibility).
It sets the alignment of the image on the page.
It is used to link the image to another page.

questions.question: Which tag is used to provide a caption for an image inside a <figure> element?
If you want a video or audio file to have play, pause, and volume buttons, which attribute should you add?
What is the role of the <source> tag inside a <video> or <audio> element?
options: It specifies the display size of the video.
It defines multiple video file options for better browser support.
It acts as a primary heading for the media element.
It includes metadata for search engines.
